loop1.title: Thermal Life
loop1.note: Showing total active power as loss proxy; winding and oil temperatures are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Thermal Timeline
loop1.note: Showing 3-hourly active power load trend — temperature (hotspot, oil, winding) and efficiency are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Life & Capacity
loop1.note: Showing life remaining (derived from energy consumption) and load/capacity fill percentages — aging caption and headroom are omitted because the asset's nameplate rating is unknown, making derated capacity and headroom calculations impossible.

loop1.title: Insulation Aging & Loss of Life
loop1.note: Showing aging factor and loss of life proxies (load factor, window energy) — no dedicated temperature or insulation aging columns are measured for this asset.
